children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: The National Recording Preservation Foundation (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Nature of Corporation
children.label: b .—Nature of Corporation
children.text: The corporation is a charitable and nonprofit corporation and is not an agency or establishment of the United States Government.

children.heading: .—Perpetual Existence
children.label: c .—Perpetual Existence
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, the corporation has perpetual existence.
